results.summary: Jan 22, 2026: Raymond James raised PT to $400. Feb 23, 2026: Wells Fargo raised PT to $387, upgraded from equal-weight. Jan 2026: One downgrade to Hold citing shares nearly doubled and appear fully valued. Another downgrade to neutral citing crowded trade. Post-Q1 (April 30): Six firms raised PTs after cloud 63% growth. Avg PT ~$365-$384 across 44-68 analyst coverage.
